name: Locus Codespaces Container
postCreateCommand: npm install -g typescript && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && curl -L --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cargo-bins/cargo-binstall/main/install-from-binstall-release.sh | bash && cargo binstall -y trunk cargo-watch && cargo build --workspace
